nasb.text: From there they journeyed and camped on the other side of the Arnon, which is in the wilderness that comes out of the border of the Amorites, for the Arnon is the border of Moab, between Moab and the Amorites.

esv.text: From there they set out and camped on the other side of the Arnon, which is in the wilderness that extends from the border of the Amorites, for the Arnon is the border of Moab, between Moab and the Amorites.

cnv.text: 又從那裡起行，在亞嫩河那邊安營；這亞嫩河是在曠野，從亞摩利人的境內流出來；原來亞嫩河就是摩押的邊界，在摩押與亞摩利人之間。

ccb.text: 又从那里出发，走到亚嫩河北岸的旷野安营。那里毗邻亚摩利人的边境，亚嫩河是摩押和亚摩利之间的疆界。
